ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emission_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "vtag" TEXT /* Variable tag indicating the type of greenhouse gas (e.g., CO2, CH4) */,
  "error_max" REAL /* Maximum error margin for the observed value */,
  "error_min" REAL /* Minimum error margin for the observed value */,
  "value" REAL /* Observed value of the emission */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of observation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., Observed) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement (e.g., W/m2) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., IPCC) */,
  "ctag" TEXT /* Category tag for classification (e.g., forcing) */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the emission data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the emission data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the emission data collection point */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data record */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_units FOREIGN KEY ("units") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_vtag FOREIGN KEY ("vtag") REFERENCES greenhouse_gases ("gas_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "greenhouse_gases" (
  "gas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each greenhouse gas */,
  "gas_name" TEXT /* Name of the greenhouse gas (e.g., Carbon Dioxide, Methane) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the greenhouse gas and its impact */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the greenhouse gas */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the greenhouse gas */,
  "global_warming_potential" REAL /* Global warming potential (GWP) over a 100-year horizon */,
  "lifetime" TEXT /* Atmospheric lifetime of the greenhouse gas */,
  "source_types" TEXT /* Common sources of the greenhouse gas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gas_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., IPCC, local environmental agencies) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for inquiries regarding the data */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., governmental, non-governmental) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the data source */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the data source's website */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., W/m2, ppm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit and its use */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  "standard_unit" TEXT /* Standard unit of measurement for conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policy maker, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES emission_data ("data_id")
)
